title: Data-efficient machine-learning of complex Fe-Mo intermetallics using domain knowledge of chemistry and crystallography
description: Source code and pre-computed data for the machine-learning pipeline used to predict formation energies and sublattice occupancies of complex TCP (topologically close-packed) intermetallic phases in the Fe-Mo binary system. Includes Jupyter notebooks, the datasetsml-tools Python package, pre-computed BOP/ACE/SOAP descriptor files, forward feature selection results, and final model predictions.
